# Stephen McCarthy

Canonical website: https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com

Stephen Thomas McCarthy is a physician assistant based in Allentown, Pennsylvania. The site contains a professional profile, controlled profile links, and essays on psychiatric ontology and diagnostic language.

Priority pages:

1. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/about
2. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/professional-record
3. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/writing
4. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/writing/audhd-psychiatric-ontology
5. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/profiles-and-sources
6. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/contact

Claim policy:

The site states that Stephen McCarthy is licensed in Pennsylvania and Utah.

Latest article:

AuDHD, Psychiatric Ontology, and the Difference Between Naming and Explaining, published July 19, 2026.
